homepage.description: SAZ Aerospace s.r.o. has been supporting our customers since 2013. We specialize in engineering and design for both the aviation, space and defence industries.

About us
SAZ Aerospace s.r.o.
has been supporting our customers since 2013.
SAZ Aerospace s.r.o. continues a rich tradition of the aerospace industry in the South Eastern Czech Region, while being an integral part of The SA Group, headquartered in Denmark, with global branches.
We specialize in engineering and design for both the
aviation
space
and
defence
industries.
Our team combines the latest technologies and software expertise with decades of experience, ensuring innovative and reliable solutions that meet the rigorous demands of our clients in both industries.
As an active member of the Czech Aerospace Cluster, we are deeply engaged with the aerospace community and committed to advancing industry standards. Additionally, we offer comprehensive support and production management, supporting seamless integration and delivery of high-quality products tailored to our clients’ needs.
Our services
SAZ Aerospace s.r.o. History
Aviation
Capability list
We excel in engineering and design for aviation industries, delivering comprehensive services from avionics and electronic systems integration to airframe design and modifications.
Our expertise includes power unit installations, structural analysis, and specialized evaluations essential for certification documentation.
Avionics and Electrical System Design
Mechanical and Airframe Design
Harness Design and Production
Analysis
Certification Support
Production Management
Space
Capability list
We excel in engineering and design for space industries, delivering comprehensive services from avionics and electronic systems integration, harness design to structure design.
Mechanical and Airframe Design
Harness Design and Production
Analysis
Military
Capability list
We excel in engineering and design for military industries, delivering comprehensive services from electronic systems integration to structural design and modifications.
Mechanical and Airframe Design and Production
Harness Design and Production
SAZ History
Founded in 2013, SAZ Aerospace s.r.o. became a proud member of The SA Group ApS, which also includes industry leaders such as Scandinavian Avionics A/S and SA Design GmbH. We started by providing specialized support in design, engineering, and certification, quickly establishing ourselves as a trusted partner within the group. Our breakthrough project was the integration of the advanced Garmin G3000 Avionics Suite, including autopilot, into Aircraft Industries newly developed L410NG aircraft, a milestone that highlighted our expertise in complex avionics systems.
Building on this foundation, SAZ Aerospace s.r.o. expanded its capabilities with significant projects like the installation of the Pratt & Whitney PT6-52 power plant in a small transport aircraft, and a wide range of avionics modifications across various aircraft types.
